name: openai.chat.completions.create
description: Cross-cutting: errored call. `status='errored'`, `output=null` (or partial), `metadata.error = {message, type, status?, request_id?, stack?}`. Renderer wraps the conversation in a red-tinted panel with the error message + type + request_id chip; the (likely empty) output area renders 'No response — the provider returned an error.' rather than nothing.

messages.content: Some prompt that hit a quota or timeout.
